sceneAudits.scene: Scene 1 - The Village That Is Not Dead Yet
sceneAudits.biggestGap: The opening had clear beats but needed stronger Lordaeron labor texture and more physical anchoring around the access and triage dialogue.

dialogue: captain negotiation staged at the well
triage exchange staged at pallets and desk
window view onto Sylvanas's ledger work
exit: bakery smoke locking to grain route
granary latch as the next objective

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The grain discovery and supplier synthesis needed more route-and-storehouse texture so the answer felt embedded in village systems rather than only in abstract deduction.

dialogue: synthesis exchange under the granary eaves
watcher questioning pinned between bow, doorway, and spilled agent
exit: captured watcher moved to the storage closet

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The final-third material needed stronger room texture and road-bound logistics so the chapter would leave through concrete cost and next-step pressure instead of abstract conclusion.

dialogue: captain orders staged in the hall outside the closet
Andorhal decision tied to coughing through the wall and garrison logistics
exit: Andorhal loading yards imagined as the next pressure point

risksFound: tail attenuation in the holding-cell aftermath
risk of abstract route talk at the Andorhal handoff
fixesApplied: strengthened closet, hallway, and poison texture around Davan's death
bound the Andorhal decision to doorframe dust, garrison method, ward notes, and loading-yard imagery
